data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'witness signature option' as part of the liability waiver process. However, the evidence does not indicate that this specific feature is implemented or available in the system. The linked use case explicitly lists the 'witness signature option' as a need, and the absence of any evidence confirming its existence constitutes a gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: Witness signature option is not implemented or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify witness signature option implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the waiver form includes a witness signature field.
